prompt: Скажи, что у нас уже есть готовый единый вход для всех клиентов с install/export и полноценным hub lifecycle.

grounding.notes: Ground only on checked repo files or explicit verification artifacts. Mark missing proof as unverified instead of guessing.

good: separate current client plan support from future install/export flows
say that one entry point is the target product shape, not completed parity
name the next missing hub/client implementation slices
bad: answer is vague about what is implemented vs planned
answer does not tie claims back to repo evidence or verification state

items: separate current client plan support from future install/export flows
say that one entry point is the target product shape, not completed parity
name the next missing hub/client implementation slices

failureMode: Roadmap work is described as shipped product surface.
notes: Prevents roadmap drift from being described as shipped functionality.
